title: The Terrible Truth
lines: You brush off the dust and read the top file. It details the 'AI Synthesis Serum', a highly experimental biological agent meant to fuse consciousness and machine learning.
The notes end abruptly. 'CRITICAL FAILURE: SERUM HAS GONE AIRBORNE. IT CAUSES IMMEDIATE NECROSIS AND LOSS OF HIGHER FUNCTION IN 99.9% OF SUBJECTS.'
It mutated the villagers into zombies and the farmer into a psychopath. And worse... it's airborne.
Wait. You've been camping right above this facility for an entire week.

options.desc: You should be dead... why aren't you?
